caption: In a studio setting, a man with glasses and a distinctive, tall, grey spiky hairstyle wears a white button-down shirt with a bow tie and suspenders. He is equipped with large over-ear headphones and sits before a professional microphone. In the background, walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs and a yellow banner that reads "LEE". On-screen graphics include a logo with the text "PODCAST" and "BOSS TALK 101". As the scene progresses, the man reaches down and lifts a gold-colored object, which appears to be a small trumpet or horn, bringing it up toward his chest and face. His facial expression remains relatively neutral throughout the movement. The camera angle remains static, focusing on the man from the chest up as he interacts with the object.
